2026-05-15T11:42:18.220Z ERROR WhatToAnswerLLM TypeError Cannot read properties of undefined reading streamChat
    at PromptAssembler.assemble (electron/services/context/PromptAssembler.ts:184:33)
    at WhatToAnswerLLM.generateStream (electron/llm/WhatToAnswerLLM.ts:139:24)
    at IntelligenceEngine.handleQuestion (electron/IntelligenceEngine.ts:412:31)
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:96:5)

2026-05-15T11:42:18.221Z ERROR WhatToAnswerLLM failed to recover; falling back to non-streaming generateContent
2026-05-15T11:42:18.241Z WARN  RateLimiter circuit breaker tripped after 3 consecutive provider errors

Repro hint: this triggered the first time the user clicked Ask after switching to a custom mode whose ModeContextRetriever returned no snippets and the active prompt suffix had not been refreshed.
